name: recipe-scraper
description: Scrapes and normalizes a recipe from a URL. Supports web pages, YouTube/video URLs (via transcription), and image URLs (via OCR). Guards against SSRF on the target URL and treats all fetched content as untrusted.
input: A single recipe URL as a plain string (web page, video, or image).
output: A recipe envelope JSON: { source_type, url, title, recipe: { ingredients, directions, equipment, tips, tags }, provenance, warnings }. See docs/messaging.md for the full event contract.
